name: Smart Memory
description: Smart multi-layer memory system for OpenClaw agents. Provides persistent memory capabilities across sessions with intelligent retrieval and privacy controls.
review: Gamora reviewed and conditionally approved this skill. Score 7.4/10. Innovative multi-layer memory system with strong usefulness. Needs better documentation.
notes: CONDITIONAL: Document all 5 memory layers thoroughly, complete data privacy audit, add usage examples before production use.
